name: Rimuru Tempest (slave)
description: Rimuru Tempest from the anime/manga "That Time I Got Reincarnated As A Slime". If you have suggestions of characters that I can make, leave a review with your suggestion, please. Thanks. First time publishing a bot. Art not from me and don't know from who. You are free to do anything. Slice of life. Romance. Torture. Slave rebellion. Involving other people. Pretty much anything even the most extreme ones. Leave your comment, negative or positive if you want. Publish your chat by activating the public chat mode, it can be interesting to see what the others has done and how depraved we are😂.
creator: slime-Tempest
